cause_analysis.narrative: Bodyworkmagic LLC churned on 2026-04-08 after 244 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-17 via app_chat — 22 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 22 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-06 via phone_call, client wrote: "Hello. Hello. Yes. Hi, Mimi. How are you? I'm good. How are you? I'm good. Can you please tell me? I was just wondering.…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
